renovacion_vida_individual.subject: IMPORTANT: RENEWAL OF INDIVIDUAL LIFE INSURANCE WITH {aseguradora} - {nombre}
renovacion_vida_individual.renewal_message: We thank you for the trust placed during this year, we ratify our commitment to continue accompanying you, providing tranquility and confidence so that you and your family are always protected. We inform you that your life insurance policy is about to renew, for which we put at your disposal the conditions and changes that will apply to your current plan.
renovacion_vida_individual.closing: Without further ado, I remain yours.
renovacion_vida_individual.note: Note: We declare having explicit consent to carry out the process for the client's benefit.
